episodes.title: Exclusive Brethren child custody battle in Montreal
episodes.description: A father who used to belong to a little-known Christian fundamentalist group is fighting for sole custody of his five children, who remain in the closed community with their mother. The father was ex-communicated from The Exclusive Brethren, also known as the Plymouth Brethren, a religious group that bans contact with the outside world. Aired Oct 3, 2011 on CBC Montreal.

episodes.title: Exclusive Brethren schooling in Montreal
episodes.description: A father who used to belong to a little-known Christian fundamentalist group is fighting for sole custody of his five children, who remain in the closed community with their mother. The CBC took a closer look at schooling in this Exclusive Brethren community. Aired Oct 5, 2011 on CBC Montreal.

episodes.title: Why the Rapture will not happen on May 21, 2011
episodes.description: People all over the USA are being warned that the rapture of Christians will happen on May 21, 2011. In this video clip, George Stroumboulopoulos proves this will not happen. Sorry, Harold Camping, you're wrong yet again. From George Stroumboulopoulos Tonight, CBC, March 21, 2011.
